problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure
hypothesis: If Piezoelectric coupling in novel crystal structure is applied to ionic, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
